corrections.rationale: Causal: bass bus crest 14 dB suggests room to glue inter-section consistency. Interactional: 2:1 ratio with 15ms attack preserves transients while gluing tail. Idiomatic: SSL-style bus glue, GR target 2-3 dB.

Causal: per-track Limiter prevents transient spikes from triggering master limiter. Interactional: ceiling -0.3 dBTP leaves room for master bus processing. Idiomatic: per-track safety net, common on bass-heavy tracks.

inspired_by.excerpt: Peak level approaching -0.5 dBFS on bass transients

rationale: Sample test drive : bus glue + safety limiter on Bass Rythm.
